leadText: Swift Swim (Japanese: すいすい Smooth Swim) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During rain , the Speed stat of Pokémon with this Ability is doubled. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Swift Swim has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] During rain , the Speed stat of Pokémon with this Ability is doubled.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts attack frequency if it is raining. MD T D S Raises the number of moves the Pokémon attempts per turn when it is raining. B S L てんきが あめだと こうげきかいすうが あがる MD GtI In the Rain weather condition, it can use a move 2 times at once for only 1 PP. * When the Pokémon uses a move in the Rain weather condition, it uses it 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! * S MD When the Pokémon uses a move in rain, it uses it 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! MD RT DX When the Pokémon uses a move in Rain or Heavy Rain, it uses the move 2 times at ones, but only consumes PP for 1 use.
